createAcronymFunction.name: Create acronym function
createAcronymFunction.description: Write an acronym function that takes three words and returns a three-letter acronym formed by taking the first letter of each word.

firstCharacter.question: How do I get just the first character of a word?
firstCharacter.answer: Indexing into the string. The first character is at index `[0]`.

buildResult.question: How do I build the three-letter result?
buildResult.answer: Take the first character of each word and join them together in order using concatenation (`+`) or a template string.
